finding: The served-identity semantic validator existed with deterministic fixtures but was not guaranteed to execute in an independent CI lane. A dedicated least-privilege workflow now executes it and the deployment-proof feeder contracts on relevant pushes, pull requests, and manual dispatches.
boundaries: No Cloudflare credentials are read by this workflow.
No payment or conversion logic is introduced.
No diagnosis or treatment claim is published.
A passing contract workflow does not prove a live hostname or deployed commit.
falsification_route: Inspect the next GitHub Actions run for Cloudflare research evidence contracts.
Introduce an origin or commit substitution fixture and confirm the workflow fails.
Do not promote C-001 until a separate deployment workflow returns a resolving immutable URL bound to the exact source commit.
